title: Evidence Journey
subtitle: Build a sober, support-ready case from the data DOCSight already has.
window_help: Start with an incident when available, or pick the evening or range you want to explain.
demo_banner: Demo mode: this checklist uses simulated sample data.
placeholder: Choose an incident or time range to see which evidence is ready, missing, stale, optional, or not applicable.
choose_window: Choose an incident or complete time range first.
copy_review_note: Review the details before sharing; this summary lists available evidence only.
item.signal.label: Signal evidence
item.signal.present: DOCSIS signal samples are available for this window.
item.signal.stale: Signal data exists, but the newest sample is older than expected for this window.
item.signal.missing: No signal samples were found in this window.
item.signal.not_applicable: This modem mode does not expose DOCSIS signal data to DOCSight.
item.speedtest.label: Speed evidence
item.speedtest.present: Speed test results are available for this window.
item.speedtest.stale: Speed evidence exists, but it may not cover the end of this window.
item.speedtest.missing: No speed test result was found in this window.
item.speedtest.optional: Speedtest Tracker is not configured; speed evidence is optional.
item.latency.label: Latency evidence
item.latency.present: Latency samples are available for this window.
item.latency.stale: Latency evidence exists, but it may not cover the end of this window.
item.latency.missing: No Connection Monitor or BQM latency sample was found in this window.
item.latency.optional: Connection Monitor and ThinkBroadband BQM are not configured; latency evidence is optional.
item.events.label: DOCSight events
item.events.present: DOCSight detected events in this window.
item.events.missing: No DOCSight events were detected in this window.
item.events.not_applicable: Event evidence depends on DOCSIS snapshots and is not available for this modem mode.
item.journal.label: Incident notes
item.journal.present: Journal notes are linked to this case.
item.journal.missing: Add a short note describing what you observed during the window.
item.bnetz.label: BNetzA measurements
item.bnetz.optional: BNetzA measurements are optional for this checklist.
item.review.label: Review before sharing
item.review.optional: Review the evidence for personal data and context before sending anything outside your home.
item.report.label: Report or summary
item.report.present: Enough evidence exists to generate a report or copy a factual summary.
item.report.missing: Add at least one evidence source before generating a useful report.
item.comparison.label: Before/after comparison
item.comparison.optional: Compare this window with another period when a technician visit, ISP change, or recurring pattern needs context.
item.latency.present_both: Connection Monitor and ThinkBroadband BQM latency samples are available for this window.
item.latency.present_cm_only: Connection Monitor latency samples are available. Add BQM when you need external validation.
item.latency.present_bqm_only: ThinkBroadband BQM latency samples are available. Add Connection Monitor for local continuous samples.
